THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERK, GREGORY WICKWIRE, BETHANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLANDER, DANIEL HOLLANDER, PATSY ANN $1,170.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,290.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS PLAINTIFF'S INITIAL SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $6000.00, REDUCED BY DEDUCTIONS OF $1375. AND AFTER CREDIT FOR DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT OF $3455.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
